q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares observed Q4 lift (~96%) to the ontology's expected 30-50% range, quantifies the deviation, and correctly identifies Q4 as above expectation.
q_aware_rationale: Numerical values (5.15M, 6.18M, 5.49M, 11.01M, order counts, AOV) are accurately summarized and a clear 'supported/confirmed' verdict is given.
